description_long: This object is a pixelated shotgun with a blocky, voxel-style design, featuring a dark brown full stock and a metallic gray receiver and barrel. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a small orange tip at the muzzle, suggesting a non-lethal or toy representation. The receiver area includes a visible magazine, likely detachable, and a prominent trigger guard beneath. The grip and fore-end are both rendered in a darker shade, providing visual contrast and ergonomic shaping. The overall construction is compact, with angular, geometric lines and a robust, utilitarian appearance. The shotgun's details, such as the magazine, trigger, and stock, are clearly defined, making it easily recognizable in an urban context.
description: A blocky, voxel-style shotgun with a dark brown stock, gray metallic receiver, and a short barrel with an orange tip. Features include a visible magazine, trigger guard, and compact, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short, thick barrel with an orange tip and the symmetrical alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full stock, visible magazine, trigger guard, and the overall compact, angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the linear alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine, trigger guard, and stock details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, unreinforced design
